title: Type-Safe Row-Level Security with Multi-Tenant Isolation Modes
author: Moya Vaca, Daniel
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: We present a multi-tenant database architecture with Row-Level Security (RLS) that uses type-safe Rust enums for policy expression evaluation, combined with three configurable isolation modes (SharedSchema, DatabasePerTenant, SchemaPerTenant). Our system features compile-time verified RLS expressions, thread-local tenant context management with RAII cleanup patterns, sliding window rate limiting for quota enforcement, and integrated Change Data Capture (CDC) for tenant migration with consistency verification. This architecture enables secure multi-tenant deployments with flexible isolation strategies while maintaining type safety throughout the RLS evaluation pipeline.
steps_raw: We present a multi-tenant database architecture with Row-Level Security (RLS) that uses type-safe Rust enums for policy expression evaluation, combined with three configurable isolation modes (SharedSchema, DatabasePerTenant, SchemaPerTenant). Our system features compile-time verified RLS expressions, thread-local tenant context management with RAII cleanup patterns, sliding window rate limiting for quota enforcement, and integrated Change Data Capture (CDC) for tenant migration with consistency verification. This architecture enables secure multi-tenant deployments with flexible isolation strategies while maintaining type safety throughout the RLS evaluation pipeline.
